---
title: "Food-security impact"
---

> **Status: pending W6.** This page is assembled once the food-security impact
> layer (`food_security/impact_layer.py`) produces validated outputs.

The primary question (`docs/PRODUCT.md` §5): how much of the 2026 cereal recovery
did the floods and fires reverse, and where — `damaged_cropland_ha` → estimated
production loss → food-security phase delta, joined to GIEWS / FEWS NET / IPC and
referenced against the 2025 drought baseline (`docs/STRUCTURE.md` §3.3, §3.4).

Planned figures (built via `viz`, validated records only):

- The drought → recovery → shock **whiplash** chart (`analysis/whiplash.py`).
- Damaged cropland and estimated production loss per AOI per event window.
- Food-security phase delta against the 2025 baseline.

<!-- TODO(W6): import validated impact records; build figures via viz helpers. -->
